title: Why AI agents will be bigger than SaaS
post:
Hot take: AI agents will make SaaS look like a minor technological shift.

Here's why: SaaS replaced manual processes with software. AI agents will replace software with autonomous execution.

Instead of logging into 10 different tools to run your business, you'll have agents that act on your behalf. They'll book your travel, negotiate your contracts, manage your finances, and close your deals—all working in the background while you focus on strategy.

We're already seeing this. The fastest-growing SaaS companies aren't just adding AI features. They're becoming AI-first platforms where the product IS the agent.

The companies that figure out agent-to-agent communication first will have an unbeatable advantage.

Are you building for an agent-first world?
